ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (0 = female, 1 = male) */,
  "chest_pain_type" INTEGER /* Type of chest pain (1 = typical angina, 2 = atypical angina, 3 = non-anginal pain, 4 = asymptomatic) */,
  "resting_blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure in mm Hg */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Serum cholesterol in mg/dl */,
  "fasting_blood_sugar" INTEGER /* Fasting blood sugar (1 = >120 mg/dl, 0 = <=120 mg/dl) */,
  "rest_ecg" INTEGER /* Resting electrocardiographic results (0 = normal, 1 = having ST-T wave abnormality, 2 = showing probable or definite left ventricular hypertrophy) */,
  "max_heart_rate" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate achieved */,
  "exercise_induced_angina" INTEGER /* Exercise-induced angina (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "st_depression" REAL /* ST depression induced by exercise relative to rest */,
  "st_slope" INTEGER /* The slope of the peak exercise ST segment (1 = upsloping, 2 = flat, 3 = downsloping) */,
  "number_of_vessels" INTEGER /* Number of major vessels (0-3) colored by fluoroscopy */,
  "thalassemia_type" INTEGER /* Thalassemia type (3 = normal, 6 = fixed defect, 7 = reversible defect) */,
  "heart_disease" INTEGER /* Heart disease diagnosis (0 = no, 1 = yes, 2 = suspected) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "smoking_status" INTEGER /* Smoking status (0 = non-smoker, 1 = smoker, 2 = former smoker) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" INTEGER /* Alcohol consumption (0 = non-drinker, 1 = occasional drinker, 2 = regular drinker) */,
  "physical_activity" INTEGER /* Physical activity level (0 = inactive, 1 = moderate, 2 = active) */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of heart disease */,
  "blood_group" TEXT /* Blood group of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the test was performed */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of diagnostic test (e.g., ECG, blood test) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was performed */,
  "test_performing_physician" TEXT /* Name of the physician who performed the test */,
  "test_reason" TEXT /* Reason for performing the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "test_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for the test */,
  "test_fasting_status" INTEGER /* Fasting status (0 = fasting, 1 = non-fasting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the plan is created */,
  "plan_start_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment plan starts */,
  "plan_end_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment plan ends */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medication prescribed */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication (e.g., daily, twice a week) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the treatment plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_physician" TEXT /* Name of the physician who created the plan */,
  "plan_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the treatment plan */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan (e.g., active, completed, suspended) */,
  "plan_start_time" TEXT /* Time the treatment plan starts */,
  "plan_end_time" TEXT /* Time the treatment plan ends */,
  "plan_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the treatment plan */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider for the patient */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., consultation, follow-up) */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made during the visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the visit */,
  "visit_location" TEXT /* Location of the visit */,
  "visit_physician" TEXT /* Name of the physician who conducted the visit */,
  "visit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in minutes */,
  "visit_complaints" TEXT /* Patient's complaints during the visit */,
  "visit_vital_signs" TEXT /* Vital signs recorded during the visit (e.g., blood pressure, heart rate) */,
  "visit_treatment_given" TEXT /* Treatment given during the visit */,
  "visit_prescription" TEXT /* Prescription issued during the visit */,
  "visit_referral" TEXT /* Referral information (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "user_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "user_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor (foreign key to `user_id` in the `users` table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource accessed (e.g., patient, test, plan) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "log_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "log_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "log_browser" TEXT /* Browser used for access */,
  "log_remaining_time" INTEGER /* Remaining time of the session (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES patient_visits ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_tests ("test_id")
)
